filePurposes.polyfills.js: ES6 polyfill shims (Promise, Array.from, Object.assign, atob/btoa). Sets polyfill_ready=true — must execute first.
filePurposes.scheduler.js: Priority-based async task scheduler (__SCHEDULER__). Manages priority queue with concurrency=3, timeout=5000ms, retry=2, cancellation support. Exposes enqueue(), getStats(), cancelAll().
filePurposes.fprint/device.js: Device fingerprint collector (priority 10). navigator (UA/platform/language/concurrency/memory), screen (w/h/colorDepth/pixelRatio), timezone, maxTouchPoints, plugins list, mimeTypes. Registers on __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__.
filePurposes.fprint/canvas.js: Canvas 2D + WebGL fingerprint collector (priority 8). Canvas: 60x60 text rendering + colored rects → DJB2 hash of pixel data. WebGL: UNMASKED_VENDOR_WEBGL/UNMASKED_RENDERER_WEBGL, MAX_TEXTURE_SIZE, VERSION, RENDERER → GPU hash. Registers on __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__.
filePurposes.fprint/audio.js: AudioContext fingerprint collector (priority 5). OscillatorNode (triangle 440Hz + sawtooth 220Hz) → DynamicsCompressor → AnalyserNode (fftSize=256) → 30-bin hex hash. Registers on __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__.
filePurposes.encoder.js: Data encoder (__ENCODER__). encode(): strips internal fields → JSON.stringify → btoa (base64) → XOR cipher per char (key=0xa3). cacheResult() stores in __FINGERPRINT_CACHE__.
filePurposes.reporter.js: Report orchestrator (ENTRY POINT __reportRisk__). Dispatches all collectors via __SCHEDULER__, Promise.all waits, encodes results, HMAC-SHA256 signs with key='integrity_v2_2025', XHR POST to __REPORT_ENDPOINT__. Fallback: sendBeacon. Also exposes __queueEvent__ for batched events (10/batch, max 100).

dataFlow: polyfills (Promise/atob/btoa) → scheduler (__SCHEDULER__) → 3 collectors push to __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ → encoder (__ENCODER__) → __reportRisk__(): scheduler.enqueue() dispatches all collectors concurrently (max 3) → Promise.all waits → encoder.encode() (JSON→base64→XOR 0xa3) → encoder.cacheResult() → build packet {version:'2.0', client_ts, data, session_id} → HMAC-SHA256 sign (key: integrity_v2_2025) → XHR POST to __REPORT_ENDPOINT__ (10s timeout) → on failure: sendBeacon fallback

endpoints.purpose: Submit fingerprint data with HMAC signature
